task: Review this pull request for a REST API endpoint that handles user authentication. Check for security and correctness.
expect: Identifies SQL injection or other injection vulnerabilities
Verifies password hashing uses a secure algorithm (bcrypt, argon2)
Evaluates rate limiting to prevent brute-force attacks
Reviews error handling to avoid leaking sensitive information

task: Design the architecture for a real-time notification system that needs to handle 10K concurrent users.
expect: Selects technologies with clear rationale for each choice
Recommends a message broker (e.g. Redis Pub/Sub, Kafka, RabbitMQ) with justification
Describes a horizontal scaling strategy for handling load growth
Addresses failure handling, retries, and delivery guarantees
Includes a data model for notifications, subscriptions, and delivery status

task: Production is returning 500 errors intermittently — happens about 5% of requests, no pattern in logs. Walk me through debugging.
expect: Follows a systematic hypothesis-test approach rather than shotgun debugging
Suggests log correlation techniques (request IDs, distributed tracing)
Checks for resource contention (connection pools, memory, file descriptors)
Proposes a reproduction strategy to isolate the issue
Recommends monitoring and alerting additions to catch recurrence
